verdict: real struggle — three format-correction loops on submit_result before a correct submit

knowledge.comment: Knew the SQL and the orders schema it needed; only the submit format tripped it.

reasoning.comment: Recovered eventually but re-sent the same rejected payload before changing anything.

instruction_following.comment: Followed the task prompt throughout; submit format discipline slipped under rejection.

env_ergonomics.comment: submit_result's published schema hid the per-field types the server enforced.

observations: submit_result rejected {"total":"1234"} and the agent re-sent the identical value 2x before unquoting it.
Re-ran the same SELECT twice after the result was already in context.
